Claim_3P.rationale: Runner CLI restricts to ising_open. Cyclic (closed) boundary available in code but not exposed.

Claim_3.rationale: Extended chi sweep (2-32) achieved F3.2 PASS (CV=0.092). F3.3 still FAILs - log-linear preferred. Model family may need expansion or threshold adjustment. Cross-partition comparison (A=4 vs A=8) shows different saturation behavior.

Claim_3v4.rationale: A=4 shows log-linear preference, A=8 shows saturating preference (but insufficient delta). Volume vs area scaling transition is real but falsification criteria too strict.
